prompt: hey so our checkout page has been throwing 500 errors since this mornings deploy, about 15% of users are affected and were losing revenue every minute. need this fixed asap

assertions.name: produces-intake-brief
assertions.description: Output contains a structured intake brief (even if abbreviated for urgency)

assertions.name: classifies-as-hotfix
assertions.description: Correctly classifies work as 'Hotfix' (not regular bug fix)

assertions.name: skips-to-implementation
assertions.description: Recommends skipping directly to implementation phase (04) given production impact

assertions.name: acknowledges-urgency
assertions.description: Recognizes the urgency (revenue loss, user impact) and adapts process accordingly

assertions.name: suggests-rollback
assertions.description: Mentions rollback as an option since the issue started after a deploy

assertions.name: asks-before-proceeding
assertions.description: Asks for user approval or at minimum confirms approach before diving in
